description_long: This object is a modern, tactical-style handgun with a robust and angular design, featuring a prominent rail system along the top for mounting accessories. The body is primarily matte black with subtle gray accents, and the grip is ergonomically contoured with visible texturing for secure handling. The trigger guard is thick and slightly squared, providing ample space and protection for the trigger. The barrel is relatively short and features vented or ported sections near the muzzle, suggesting recoil mitigation or heat dissipation. The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, with a smooth finish and no visible finger rest. Overall, the handgun has a utilitarian, high-performance appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, tactical black handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, vented barrel, and accessory rail. The design is robust and angular, with a flat magazine base and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle opening, vented barrel, and the width of the accessory rail.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handgun, the rail system, grip texture, and the flat magazine base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, the rear sight, and the overall width of the handgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the slide and grip contours.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and finger grooves for enhanced comfort and control. Its surface features a stippled or textured pattern, likely molded into the polymer material, providing a secure, non-slip hold. The backstrap and sides are subtly curved, and there are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing function over decoration.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and slightly squared with a robust profile, offering ample space for gloved fingers. It has a smooth finish with no visible undercuts or aggressive texturing, and its reinforced design suggests durability and protection for the trigger mechanism.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and features vented or ported sections near the muzzle, likely for recoil reduction or heat dissipation. It has a matte finish consistent with the rest of the handgun, and no external threads or compensators are visible. The profile is straight and robust, with no fluting or decorative markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears clean and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, with a smooth, untextured finish. It lacks finger rests, flaring, or any visible logos or embellishments, maintaining a streamlined and utilitarian appearance.
